generated_oml:
vocab: DTDFVocab

// ----- Sensing Components -----
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring electrical current of the motor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentTelemetry
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor measuring motor angular position",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleTelemetry
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearbox encoder located behind the gearbox measuring joint degrees of freedom",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleTelemetry
]

// ----- Data Transmitted (via MQTT) -----
instance CurrentTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorAngleTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

// ----- Data (collected from transmitted telemetry) -----
instance CurrentTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Traces of measured motor current collected in real‑time",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentTelemetry
]

instance MotorAngleTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Traces of motor angular position collected in real‑time",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleTelemetry
]

instance GearboxAngleTraceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Traces of gearbox angular position collected in real‑time",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker,
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleTelemetry
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque calculated from current and angle data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool,
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentTraceData
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity calculated from gearbox angle data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool,
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngleTraceData
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular acceleration calculated from velocity data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool,
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
]

instance ActionableFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actionable friction data incorporating motor torque and velocity characteristics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool,
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
]

// ----- Models -----
instance EngineeringModelAxis : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering model of the first axis comprising the motor and gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the dual‑stage gearbox",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelWhiteBox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction model based on analytic formulations",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModelBlackBox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black‑box friction model identified from empirical data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

// ----- Enablers -----
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool used for structural modeling of the system",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation environment for dynamic modelling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells integration for data connectivity",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterProvisionService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating live telemetry of sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard used for real‑time visualization of joint behavior",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

// ----- Services -----
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring and visualization of joint behavior",
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction models (white‑box and black‑box)",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacteristicInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides WearConditionInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterProvisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provision of friction parameters for improved motion control",
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateFrictionModelAction
]

// ----- Insights & Actions -----
instance FrictionCharacteristicInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into joint friction characteristics for model refinement"
]

instance WearConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into wear or operating conditions affecting friction"
]

instance MotionControlAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into improved motion control accuracy derived from friction identification"
]

instance UpdateFrictionModelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction model parameters based on continuous identification",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// ----- Physical Environment & Components -----
instance MabiMax100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Industrial robot MABI MAX 100 used for friction analysis"
]

instance FirstJointAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First joint/axis comprising a permanent‑magnet synchronous motor and dual‑stage gearbox"
]

instance MabiMax100Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MabiMax100Robot, FirstJointAxisComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Not in Document – the current implementation only visualizes and identifies friction models; no actuation commands are sent back to the robot."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time continuous data acquisition and simulation; the digital shadow processes live data streams and updates models continuously as operations of the physical robot occur; no fixed sampling interval is specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central digital shadow consisting of (1) asset description (engineering model), (2) simulation and data‑calculation models, (3) processing components that compute traces, (4) live data sources via MQTT, and (5) a dashboard UI."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates at the operated phase, using real‑time sensor data; it builds on manufactured engineering models and updates during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Not in Document – the paper does not detail specific V&V procedures or uncertainty quantification beyond noting continuous model refinement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor telemetry between the physical robot and the digital shadow; data traces are stored with provenance and traceability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Not in Document – hosting details of the digital shadow (local server, cloud, etc.) are not specified."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not in Document – no exchange with external information systems is described."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not in Document – ownership and privacy aspects are not addressed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for modeling, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) as a standard for data representation, and MQTT as a communication protocol."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Not in Document – no cybersecurity or safety analysis is presented."
]
